description: 250 prompts for the Arborian Network trip planner (15 cities, 6 regions). Grouped by how many specialist agents are required — moderator is the entry point and does not count. Distribution: 50 single_agent, 75 two_agents, 125 all_agents. Two scenarios: baseline (default, no enhancements) and full (skills + memory + ontology on).

groups.single_agent: One specialist agent needed (schedule_agent OR itinerary_agent OR concierge_agent)
